Lesson 04 — Decimals operations

Add, subtract, multiply and divide decimals; convert between fractions and decimal.

Exercise

Calculate 3.75 + 2.4 and 4.5 × 0.2; convert 3/8 to decimal.

Lesson 04 — Decimals operations

Perform arithmetic with decimals and relate to fractions.

Exercise

Solve decimal addition, subtraction, multiplication and division problems.
